Applications & Roadmap
Phase 1 — Critical
Phase 2 — High
Phase 3 — Medium
Phase 4 — Low
📄
Sales
Quotation
Build and manage truck quotes. Hino, Isuzu, Daihatsu, Hohan. Print-ready PDF output.
Live
👥
Sales / Admin
Customer & Fleet DB
Single source of truth for all customers and their vehicles. SLD tracking, proactive marketing.
Phase 1
🚛
Sales
Stock Card & WIP
Replace WhatsApp + Google Sheets. Track every unit from PO to delivery, with cashflow projection.
Phase 1
📣
Workshop Marketing
Workshop CRM
Proactive customer follow-up, SLD compliance tracking, parts programme progress and loyalty records.
Phase 2
🔧
Workshop
Workshop Ops
Digital job cards, bay utilisation, technician KPI. Service, puspakom, accident and bodywork jobs.
Phase 2
⚙️
Parts
Parts Department
Live stock count, min/max reorder, warranty parts tracking. Replaces manual scanner reconciliation.
Phase 2
📁
Sales
Document Library
Centralised brochures, specs and namecards by brand. One-tap share to WhatsApp or download.
Phase 3
🔗
Admin / Workshop
HDMS Integration
Auto-key invoices into Hino's HDMS system. Eliminate triple-entry for warranty, parts and service.
Phase 3
🔄
Sales
Second Hand & Trade-In
Track secondhand inventory and trade-in pipeline. Know which customer's truck is ready to upgrade.
Phase 3
📱
Marketing
Online Marketing
Facebook, Instagram, TikTok and Google performance in one dashboard. Post calendar and lead tracking.
Phase 4
🎓
HR / Management
HR & Training
Staff training calendar, Hino-mandated compliance tracking, attendance and KPI records.
Phase 4
